title: onagra grandiflora
intro: Onagra grandiflora, also known as Evening Primrose, is a biennial flowering plant native to North America. Its medicinal properties include high levels of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid that has anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Evening Primrose oil include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and eczema. Evening Primrose oil is often prepared through cold-pressing of the seeds, and is used in herbal preparations, such as supplements and topical creams, to support overall well-being.
